page.name: CUE-SEARCH

pad1.color: has_cue "MIX IN 1" ? cue_color "MIX IN 1" : has_cue "INTRO 1" ? cue_color "INTRO 1" : has_cue "INTRO 1" ? cue_color "INTRO 1" : has_cue "INTRO" ? cue_color "INTRO" : offcolor
pad1.name: `has_cue "MIX IN 1" ? get_text "MIX IN 1" : has_cue "INTRO 1" ? get_text "INTRO 1" : has_cue "MIX IN" ? get_text "MIX IN" : has_cue "INTRO 1" ? get_text "INTRO 1" : has_cue "INTRO" ? get_text "INTRO" : ""`

page.pad1: has_cue "MIX IN 1" ? goto_cue "MIX IN 1" & play : has_cue "INTRO 1" ? goto_cue "INTRO 1" & play : has_cue "MIX IN" ? goto_cue "MIX IN" & play : has_cue "INTRO" ? goto_cue "INTRO" & play : nothing
page.pad2: has_cue "BUILD 1" ? goto_cue "BUILD 1" & play : has_cue "BUILD" ? goto_cue "BUILD" & play : nothing

pad5.name: `has_cue "MIX IN 2" ? get_text "MIX IN 2" : has_cue "INTRO 2" ? get_text "INTRO 2" : ""`
pad5.color: has_cue "MIX IN 2" ? cue_color "MIX IN 2" : has_cue "INTRO 2" ? cue_color "INTRO 2" : offcolor

page.pad5: has_cue "MIX IN 2" ? goto_cue "MIX IN 2" & play : has_cue "INTRO 2" ? goto_cue "INTRO 2" & play : nothing

pad9.name: `has_cue "MIX IN 3" ? get_text "MIX IN 3" : has_cue "INTRO 3" ? get_text "INTRO 3" : ""`
pad9.color: has_cue "MIX IN 3" ? cue_color "MIX IN 3" : has_cue "INTRO 3" ? cue_color "INTRO 3" : offcolor

page.pad9: has_cue "MIX IN 3" ? goto_cue "MIX IN 3" & play : has_cue "INTRO 3" ? goto_cue "INTRO 3" & play : nothing

pad13.name: `has_cue "MIX IN 4" ? get_text "MIX IN 4" : has_cue "INTRO 4" ? get_text "INTRO 4" : ""`
pad13.color: has_cue "MIX IN 4" ? cue_color "MIX IN 4" : has_cue "INTRO 4" ? cue_color "INTRO 4" : offcolor

page.pad13: has_cue "MIX IN 4" ? goto_cue "MIX IN 4" & play : has_cue "INTRO 4" ? goto_cue "INTRO 4" & play : nothing

shift_pad1.name: `has_cue "MIX IN 3" ? get_text "MIX IN 3 : has_cue "INTRO 3" ? get_text "INTRO 3" : ""`
shift_pad1.color: has_cue "MIX IN 3" ? cue_color "MIX IN 3" : has_cue "INTRO 3" ? cue_color "INTRO 3" : offcolor

page.shift_pad1: has_cue "MIX IN 3" ? goto_cue "MIX IN 3" & play : has_cue "INTRO 3" ? goto_cue "INTRO 3" & play : nothing

shift_pad13.color: has_cue "MIX IN 4" ? cue_color "MIX IN 4" : has_cue "INTRO 4" ? cue_color "INTRO 4" : offcolor
